attributes.description: This dashboard shows Gateways collected by the Axonius Integration.

params.markdown:
This dashboard provides a focused view of gateway-related information from Axonius.

It includes a Gateway by Status pie chart to quickly show the distribution of gateway statuses. Key metrics highlight the counts of Default Gateways and Non-Default Gateways. A saved search displays Email Essential Details, while a table lists the Top DNS Servers for better visibility into network configuration. Additional gateway attributes are available through the Tunnel Proxy Details saved search.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/axonius)**

attributes.title: [Logs Axonius] Gateway
